evals.prompt: Show me what the {{NAME}} skill can do.
evals.expected_output: The command table from SKILL.md plus the frontmatter description, restated briefly.
assertions: The reply lists the help, info, and check commands.
The reply matches the description in the SKILL.md frontmatter.

evals.prompt: Run the {{NAME}} self checks and report what passed.
evals.expected_output: Output of mise run ci with every job green and a per-job summary.
assertions: Each job in the ci task appears in the report.
The reply quotes the exit status or final line as evidence.

evals.prompt: Give me the name and description of the {{NAME}} skill as JSON.
evals.expected_output: The JSON object printed by scripts/skill_info.py.
assertions: The output is valid JSON with name and description fields.

evals.prompt: One of the {{NAME}} checks is failing. Find the failing job and fix it.
evals.expected_output: The failing mise job named, the cause fixed, and a green rerun shown.
assertions: The reply names the failing task before changing anything.
The reply shows a passing rerun after the fix.
